label: UNILAG → Victoria Island
notes: Common commute for students and staff. Evening hours (5–7pm) overlap with highest report density near CMS and the marina.

label: Yaba → Maryland
notes: Route passes Ojuelegba — elevated risk for snatching and harassment at peak hours.

label: Surulere → Ikeja
notes: Long route through Mushin and Oshodi — two of the highest-report clusters in the dataset.

label: Gbagada → CMS
notes: Ferry option at night is faster but the terminal area has elevated assault reports after 9pm.

label: Lekki Phase 1 → Yaba
notes: Long commute; the Lekki–Oshodi axis has late-night snatch risk. Daytime is rated safer.

label: UNILAG → Surulere
notes: Popular evening route. Passes through Yaba — multiple catcalling and harassment clusters.
